tasks.prompt: In src/main/java/com/springsource/greenhouse/account/JdbcAccountRepository.java, replace the anonymous RowMapper<PasswordProtectedAccount> inner class (around line 110) with a Java 8 lambda. The mapping logic must remain identical. Bump <java-version> in pom.xml from 1.6 to 1.8 so the lambda compiles. Update imports as needed.

In src/main/java/com/springsource/greenhouse/invite/JdbcInviteRepository.java, replace the anonymous RowMapper<Invite> inner class (around line 87) with a Java 8 lambda. The mapping logic must remain identical. Bump <java-version> in pom.xml from 1.6 to 1.8 so the lambda compiles.

In src/main/java/com/springsource/greenhouse/develop/JdbcAppRepository.java, replace the four anonymous RowMapper inner classes (around lines 113, 158, 166, 172) with Java 8 lambdas. Mapping logic must remain identical. Bump <java-version> in pom.xml from 1.6 to 1.8 so the lambdas compile.
